title: The 1968 Pact on Shipping Routes in the Strait of Hormuz That Iran Is Rejecting
summary_full: For decades, a maritime agreement negotiated by Iran and Oman has governed the main pathways through the strait.
summary_public: For decades, a maritime agreement negotiated by Iran and Oman has governed the main pathways through the strait.
